overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The player character navigates neon-lit streets with holographic advertisements, crosses intersections with yellow crosswalks, and enters a darker underpass. Heavy use of ray-traced reflections on wet pavement and vibrant pink, cyan, and purple neon signage creates a cinematic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with holographic advertisements and neon signage

events.description: turns right after crossing the intersection onto the main sidewalk
waits for futuristic vehicles to pass before continuing across the side street

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk and turning right onto the sidewalk while observing the neon-lit cityscape

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection
pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street ahead of the player

entered.detail: tall red rectangular sign with white text marking a commercial building corner
large holographic advertisement displaying a woman with purple hair
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes reflecting on wet asphalt
tall pole with pedestrian crossing signal and yellow walk sign
curved modern glass building with teal and pink neon accents visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-soaked intersection in a futuristic city at night. The player crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk while holographic advertisements glow on nearby buildings. After crossing, the character turns right onto the sidewalk, passing a red commercial sign and observing moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles moving through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with curved glass arcade building and neon pillar lights

events.description: moves from open intersection into the covered walkway area beside the glass arcade building
passing the large yellow and white SPHERE advertisement sign on the glass building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a curved glass building with vibrant vertical neon pillar lights reflecting on the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: vertical neon light strips in pink and cyan running along the glass building facade
large yellow and white circular advertisement sign with SPHERE text
circular purple neon sign hanging over the street marking a distant intersection
tall modern street lights illuminating the wet sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial street dominated by a curved glass arcade building covered in vibrant neon pillar lights. The player passes other pedestrians while the SPHERE advertisement sign becomes prominent on the right. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights, and a circular overhead neon sign marks the approach to the next intersection in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching underpass with traffic intersection and commercial storefronts

events.description: stops at red traffic light before crossing the side street intersection
entering darker shadow area as the character approaches the covered underpass entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching an intersection, waiting for the traffic signal to change, then crossing the side street toward the dark underpass entrance

notable_agents.action: black futuristic truck stopped at the red traffic light

entered.detail: street crossing with traffic lights and white crosswalk lines
row of commercial buildings with bright neon signage and storefronts
scattered trash bags and debris along the sidewalk edge
dark tunnel-like entrance to the covered walkway ahead

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a traffic intersection where a black futuristic truck waits at a red light. After crossing, the character continues toward a dark underpass entrance while passing commercial buildings with bright neon signage on the left. The lighting gradually dims as the covered walkway approaches, and trash debris lines the right side of the wet sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark urban underpass with concrete pillars and neon reflections

events.description: enters the covered underpass with significantly reduced ambient lighting
passing massive concrete support pillars with red neon light reflections shimmering on the wet ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass with neon reflections from nearby signs shimmering on the wet pavement, approaching distant pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera in the dark corridor ahead

entered.detail: dark concrete ceiling of the covered walkway blocking the sky
massive dark concrete support columns lining the right side of the walkway
glowing red and blue neon signs on the left wall of the underpass
colorful neon light reflections dancing on the wet pavement surface

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark, covered underpass where the sky is completely obscured by concrete infrastructure. Massive support pillars line the right side while neon billboards cast colorful reflections on the wet ground. The lighting shifts to low artificial sources, and distant pedestrians approach from the far end of the corridor as the character continues walking deeper into the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis that transitions from vibrant, neon-lit open streets into a dim, enclosed urban underpass. It begins at a glowing intersection where the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath holographic advertisements before turning right past a red commercial sign and flowing traffic. As the camera moves along a commercial street, the environment becomes dominated by a curved glass arcade with vibrant neon pillars and a prominent SPHERE advertisement reflecting off the wet pavement. The scene then shifts toward another intersection where a black futuristic truck waits at a red light, leading the camera past bright signage and trash-lined sidewalks toward a darkening horizon. Finally, the open city sky vanishes as the camera enters a covered underpass, where massive concrete pillars and low artificial lighting replace the city glow, casting colorful billboard reflections across the damp ground.
